task_completion.description: Navigate to the WooCommerce Product Export page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: WordPress admin dashboard is visible, specifically the 'Export Products' screen showing dropdowns for columns, product types, and categories.

task_completion.description: Filter the export to only include the 'Clothing' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dropdown labeled 'Which product category should be exported?' has 'Clothing' selected.

task_completion.description: Limit the export to the required columns (SKU, Name, Regular price).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dropdown labeled 'Which columns should be exported?' contains exactly 'SKU', 'Name', and 'Regular price'. No other columns should be visible in this selection field.

task_completion.description: Initiate the CSV generation and download process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Generate CSV' button is clicked, or a browser download prompt/notification appears for the exported WooCommerce CSV file.

task_completion.description: Save the file to the specified path with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog, file manager window, or terminal showing the file named 'clothing_prices.csv' located inside the '/home/ga/Documents' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WooCommerce web interface to generate the export.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the WordPress/WooCommerce admin panel in a web browser, not just terminal commands like WP-CLI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually exported the data rather than manually creating a file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Generate CSV' button being clicked or a browser download initiated from the WooCommerce page, rather than opening a text editor or spreadsheet app to manually type product data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just rename an existing unrelated CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'clothing_prices.csv' should clearly originate from the browser download of the WooCommerce export.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target category is 'Clothing'. Required columns are exactly 'SKU', 'Name', and 'Regular price'. Output file must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/clothing_prices.csv'. Ensure no forbidden columns (e.g., Description, Short description, Stock, Weight, Length) are selected in the WooCommerce export UI.
